purpose: Audit whether Clone Wars Campaign Guide feats are implemented with the correct runtime shape, not merely whether they exist or have metadata.
accuracyStandard: implemented_correct requires the implementation mode to match source behavior and to have a known runtime consumer in the uploaded baseline.
Metadata-only or note-only support is implemented_partial when a real hook, prompt, state tracker, or derived calculator is needed.
Wrong-shape automation is implemented_incorrect, even if a modifier exists.
Conditional attack options can be correct when represented as ATTACK_OPTION rules consumed by CombatOptionResolver.
Force-adjacent resource feats are not static Force bonuses.

statusDefinitions.implemented_correct: Runtime shape matches source behavior closely enough for current system scope.
statusDefinitions.implemented_partial: Correct metadata or placeholder exists, but runtime hook, picker, trigger, duration, or usage tracking is not proven.
statusDefinitions.implemented_incorrect: Observed implementation grants the wrong kind of benefit or applies in the wrong context.
statusDefinitions.not_implemented: No meaningful metadata or runtime behavior was found.
statusDefinitions.metadata_correct: The feat is intentionally metadata/manual and should not be automated.
statusDefinitions.source_review_required: Need exact source context before deciding implementation shape.

feats.name: Anointed Hunter
feats.description: If you end your Move at least 2 squares from where you started, you gain a +1 competence bonus on attacks made with Thrown Weapons until the end of your turn.
feats.expectedRuleShape: After moving at least 2 squares, gain +1 competence on thrown weapon attacks until end of turn.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.rules defines an ATTACK_OPTION requiring ranged/thrown context plus movedAtLeastTwoSquares and applies +1 attack. CombatOptionResolver consumes ATTACK_OPTION attack modifiers.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correct runtime shape for the current combat-option model; depends on caller supplying the movement context flag.

feats.name: Artillery Shot
feats.description: When you make an attack with a Burst or Splash weapon with which you are proficient against a target at greater than Point-Blank Range, you can affect two additional squares adjacent to the normal Burst radius or Splash area.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Burst/Splash proficient attack beyond point-blank affects two additional adjacent squares.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata has a plausible ATTACK_OPTION with areaBonusSquares, but no current code consumer for areaBonusSquares was found in the uploaded baseline.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs area-template/targeting workflow support; cannot be considered runtime-correct yet.

feats.name: Coordinated Barrage
feats.description: When you Aid Another ally's attack, for every 3 points that the ally's attack roll beats the target's Reflex Defense, the attack deals +1 die of damage. The maximum number of bonus damage dice the attack receives is equal to the number of allies with this Feat that aided on the attack roll or +5 dice, whichever is lower.
feats.expectedRuleShape: When aiding an ally attack, add +1 damage die per 3 points over Reflex, capped by aiding allies with the feat or +5 dice.
feats.observedImplementation: aidAnotherRules metadata exists with the right shape, but no runtime consumer for aidAnotherRules was found in the uploaded baseline.
feats.accuracyFinding: Requires Aid Another/ally-count/margin-over-Reflex damage rider workflow.

feats.name: Droid Hunter
feats.description: While wielding a weapon with which you are proficient, you gain a +2 bonus on damage rolls against Droid enemies, or +4 if you are using a weapon that deals Ion Damage.
feats.expectedRuleShape: +2 damage against droid enemies with proficient weapons, or +4 with ion damage weapons.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.rules defines two ATTACK_OPTION damage rules keyed to droid target and ion/non-ion damage contexts. CombatOptionResolver consumes damageModifier.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correct runtime shape for current attack/damage option aggregation, assuming target/damage context is supplied.

feats.name: Droidcraft
feats.description: You can use the Repair Droid aspect of the Mechanics skill in 10 minutes.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Repair Droid aspect of Mechanics takes 10 minutes.
feats.observedImplementation: skillUseRules metadata exists and blocks static bonuses, but no skillUseRules runtime consumer was found in the uploaded baseline.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs Mechanics/Repair Droid action timing display or GM workflow hook.

feats.name: Experienced Medic
feats.description: You can perform Surgery on a number of creatures equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum 2) simultaneously. You make Treat Injury checks for each individual creature as normal.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Perform Surgery on creatures equal to Intelligence modifier, minimum 2, simultaneously; make checks separately.
feats.observedImplementation: skillUseRules-style metadata exists, but no runtime surgery/capacity workflow consumer was found.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correct as metadata but not an automated Treat Injury procedure workflow.

feats.name: Expert Droid Repair
feats.description: You can use Repair Droid to a number of Droids equal to your Intelligence modifier (Minimum 2) simultaneously. You make Mechanics checks for each Droid as normal.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Use Repair Droid on a number of droids equal to Intelligence modifier, minimum 2, simultaneously.
feats.observedImplementation: skillUseRules metadata exists, but no skillUseRules runtime consumer was found in the uploaded baseline.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs Mechanics/Repair Droid procedure workflow support.

feats.name: Flash and Clear
feats.description: When you damage a target with a Burst or Splash weapon, you gain Concealment against that target until the beginning of your next turn.
feats.expectedRuleShape: After damaging a target with Burst/Splash weapon, gain concealment against that target until beginning of next turn.
feats.observedImplementation: ATTACK_OPTION targetEffectsOnHit metadata exists. CombatOptionResolver collects targetEffectsOnHit, but no proven concealment-state application/lifecycle was found.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs hit-resolution effect application and expiry tracking.

feats.name: Flood of Fire
feats.description: When you make an Area Attack with a weapon set on Autofire, and you are proficient with that weapon, all targets in the area lose all dodge or deflection bonuses to Reflex Defense against the Autofire attack.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Autofire area targets lose dodge/deflection bonuses to Reflex Defense against the attack.
feats.observedImplementation: ATTACK_OPTION targetEffectsOnHit metadata exists, but no consumer for IGNORE_TARGET_DODGE_DEFLECTION_TO_REFLEX was found.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs target-defense component suppression in the attack resolution path.

feats.name: Grand Army of the Republic Training
feats.description: If you wear Armor that provides an Equipment bonus to your Fortitude Defense, and you are proficient with that Armor, you also apply the Armor's Equipment bonus to your Will Defense.
feats.expectedRuleShape: If proficient in armor that gives Fortitude equipment bonus, also apply that armor equipment bonus to Will Defense.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata describes equipped armor contextual defense, but no proven derived-defense hook consumes this feat in the uploaded baseline.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs defense calculator integration and tooltip/breakdown parity.

feats.name: Gunnery Specialist
feats.description: While you are the Gunner of a Vehicle, you are considered proficient with Vehicle Weapons. Additionally, once per encounter, you can reroll an attack roll made with a Vehicle Weapon, though you must keep the second result, even if it is worse. You can declare this reroll after you learn the result of the attack roll, but before damage is resolved.
feats.expectedRuleShape: While gunner of a vehicle, count as proficient with vehicle weapons; once per encounter reroll a vehicle weapon attack and keep second result.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata captures attack reroll context, but no proven vehicle-role proficiency hook or once-per-encounter vehicle weapon reroll prompt was found.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs vehicle role context, proficiency override, and reroll lifecycle tracking.

feats.name: Jedi Familiarity
feats.description: Once per encounter, when you are targeted or affected by a Force Power or Force Talent originating from an ally, you gain one temporary Force Point, which must be spent before the end of the encounter or it goes away. If the Force Power or Force Talent damages you or moves you down the Condition Track, you do not gain the benefit of this Feat.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Once per encounter, when targeted/affected by an ally Force power/talent that does not damage or move you down CT, gain a temporary Force Point for the encounter.
feats.observedImplementation: resourceRules metadata exists, but current code appears to collect resource notes rather than trigger this event and temporary resource lifecycle automatically.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs Force power/talent target event, ally validation, damage/CT exclusion, once-per-encounter tracking, and temp FP expiry.

feats.name: Leader of Droids
feats.description: Whenever you provide a beneficial, Mind-Affecting effect to your allies, you may select from among these allies a number of Droids equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum 1). The Droids you designate ignore their Mind-Affecting immunity with regards to this effect, provided they are willing to ignore this immunity.
feats.expectedRuleShape: When you provide a beneficial mind-affecting effect to allies, choose willing droids up to Intelligence modifier to ignore mind-affecting immunity for that effect.
feats.observedImplementation: Metadata/table-context note exists, but no automatic mind-affecting ally effect distribution or droid immunity-bypass prompt was found.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correct implementation is a targeted effect prompt, not passive math.

feats.name: Overwhelming Attack
feats.description: You must spend two Swift Actions in the same round to activate this Feat. If your target attempts to use a Talent, Feat, or other ability to negate your attack (Such as Block, Deflect, or Vehicular Combat), the target takes a -5 penalty to any attack rolls or Skill Checks it makes to negate the attack. This effect applies to the next attack you make before the end of the same round.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Spend two swift actions; target takes -5 on rolls/checks to negate your next attack before end of round.
feats.observedImplementation: ATTACK_OPTION metadata includes requiresSwiftActions and targetEffectsOnHit, but no proven swift-action spending or Block/Deflect/Vehicular Combat negation hook consumes the penalty.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs action economy and negation-attempt integration.

feats.name: Pall of the Dark Side
feats.description: You can add one-half your Dark Side Score (Minimum 1) to any Use the Force checks made to resist attempts to detect you with the Sense Force application of the Use the Force skill.
feats.expectedRuleShape: Add half Dark Side Score, minimum +1, to Use the Force checks to resist Sense Force detection.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.skillCheckBonuses defines scoped Use the Force context and SkillFeatResolver consumes skillCheckBonuses with actor/context resolution.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correct scoped skill-bonus shape; not an unconditional Use the Force bonus.

feats.name: Separatist Military Training
feats.description: While you are adjacent to at least one of your allies, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus on any one attack roll you make on your turn.
feats.expectedRuleShape: While adjacent to at least one ally, gain +1 circumstance bonus on one attack roll you make on your turn.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.rules defines an ATTACK_OPTION requiring allyAdjacent and applying +1 attack. CombatOptionResolver consumes attackModifier.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correct runtime shape; disabled legacy modifier value does not apply.

feats.name: Spray Shot
feats.description: When you have a weapon set on Autofire, you can reduce the area targeted by your Autofire attack to 1 square.
feats.expectedRuleShape: With weapon set on Autofire, reduce the Autofire target area to 1 square.
feats.observedImplementation: ATTACK_OPTION metadata has autofireAreaSquares and suppresses defaultAutofireArea, but no current code consumer for autofireAreaSquares/default-area suppression was found.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs autofire targeting/template integration.

feats.name: Trench Warrior
feats.description: When you are adjacent to a wall or object that provides you with Cover from your target's ranged attacks, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus on your attack rolls against that target.
feats.expectedRuleShape: When adjacent to cover from target ranged attacks, gain +1 circumstance attack bonus against that target.
feats.observedImplementation: abilityMeta.rules defines ATTACK_OPTION requiring ranged attack and adjacentCoverFromTarget context and applies +1 attack. CombatOptionResolver consumes attackModifier.
feats.accuracyFinding: Correct runtime shape for roll-context option.

feats.name: Unwavering Resolve
feats.description: You gain a +5 insight bonus to Will Defense against Deception and Persuasion checks.
feats.expectedRuleShape: +5 insight to Will Defense against Deception and Persuasion checks.
feats.observedImplementation: conditionalDefenseBonuses metadata exists, but no runtime consumer for conditionalDefenseBonuses was found in the uploaded baseline.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs social-skill attack/defense workflow or Will defense contextual resolver.

feats.name: Wary Defender
feats.description: When you use the Fight Defensively Action, you gain a +2 competence bonus to your Fortitude Defense and Will Defense until the beginning of your next turn.
feats.expectedRuleShape: When using Fight Defensively, gain +2 competence to Fortitude and Will until beginning of next turn.
feats.observedImplementation: conditionalDefenseBonuses metadata exists, but no consumer was found that applies the temporary Fortitude/Will bonus when Fight Defensively is used.
feats.accuracyFinding: Needs Fight Defensively state/effect lifecycle and defense breakdown support.
